text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of quiet curiosity. The glass walls and minimal interior invite me to reflect on transparency—both literal and metaphorical. Standing before the colorful 'R+D' exhibit, I sense the pulse of innovation and human ambition. The vivid, playful design and the talk of research, development, and intelligent machines provoke me to ponder our evolving place among the technologies we create. I am inspired, and just a little bit awed by the promise of collective discovery at the intersection of art, science, and philosophy.
